title: Redirecting *.pages.dev to a Custom Domain
excerpt: title: Redirecting *.pages.dev to a Custom Domain description: Use Bulk Redirects to redirect your pages.dev subdomain to a custom domain. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Learn how to use [Bulk Redirects](https://developers.cloudflare.com/rules/url-forwarding/bulk-redirects/) to redirect your `*.pages.dev` subdomain to your [custom domain](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/configuration/custom-domains/).
